serves: links[] entries with kind: api (url field, e.g. SwaggerHub)
environments/*.md (health_endpoint) and links[] entries with kind: status-page
_paik.notes: Generic HTTP fetch server. Used as the SwaggerHub fallback since there is no single ubiquitous official SwaggerHub MCP server - swap in a dedicated one if your org standardizes on it. Also doubles as a simple way to poll health_endpoint URLs.
